completedPhaseClaimDetails.evidence: 8-artifact bugfix-fastlane packet authored under specs/042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern/bugs/BUG-042-007-stale-scenario-manifest-and-traceability-skip/ (bug.md + spec.md + design.md + scopes.md + scenario-manifest.json + report.md + state.json + uservalidation.md).

Full block in report.md Test Evidence.
